questions.statement: What is the name of the integrated digital portal launched by the Government of India to streamline Corporate Social Responsibility partnerships for women and child welfare?
Which of the following statements regarding the recent developments announced in the Union Budget 2026&ndash;27 is <em><strong>INCORRECT</strong></em>?
options: The Union Budget 2026&ndash;27 proposes a public capital expenditure of ₹12.2 lakh crore to drive infrastructure-led economic growth. /
Public capital expenditure has increased from ₹2 lakh crore in 2014&ndash;15 to ₹11.2 lakh crore in the Budget Estimates for 2025&ndash;26. /
The Infrastructure Risk Guarantee Fund proposed in the Budget will provide full sovereign guarantees to private developers for all phases of infrastructure projects. /
To raise the share of inland waterways and coastal shipping from six per cent to 12 per cent by 2047, the government will launch the Coastal Cargo Promotion Scheme. /

questions.statement: The British fashion designer, Victoria Beckham, was recently honoured by the French Ministry of Culture with which prestigious title in January 2026?
options: Officer of the Legion of Honour /
Commander of the National Order of Merit /
Knight of the Order of Arts and Letters /
Officer of the Order of Academic Palms /
